series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains records generally associated with attendance and completion of a boating safety education course, as mandated by law. Upon entry of student data into a database, a plastic boater education card it printed and mailed to the student. The data may be updated by the student for various reasons.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Electronic data will be retained superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Paper: mailed student or entered in database
